stylePrompt:
Create a completely original lighting product inspired by Light American elegance.

The design should reinterpret American residential luxury in a lighter, softer, more contemporary way.

The final product should feel warm, relaxed, refined, spacious, elegant, and suitable for high-end villas, large apartments, boutique residences, and modern family interiors.

The design should blend the comfort of American home aesthetics with the clarity of contemporary luxury lighting.

Avoid heavy traditional American decoration.

Avoid rustic farmhouse style.

Avoid overly dark, bulky, or old-fashioned forms.

The lamp should feel:

Relaxed
Elegant
Warm
Comfortable
Refined
Spacious
Timeless
Family-friendly
Commercially viable
Suitable for luxury residential interiors

The beauty should come from generous proportions, clean structure, warm materials, soft light diffusion, and understated decorative details.

The product should look premium but not overly formal.

The design should feel like a modern American designer lighting product suitable for upscale home interiors.
specificElements: The clean line of a Shaker cabinet frame
The soft curve of an arched doorway

The relaxed fold of linen curtains
The warm glow of a fireplace mantel
The tapered form of a classic American furniture leg
The rectangular rhythm of wall paneling
The woven texture of rattan furniture
The soft dome profile of a coastal pendant shade
The balanced geometry of a modern lantern frame
The layered cushions of an American family sofa
The brushed brass detail of cabinet hardware
The horizontal proportion of a large kitchen island
The calm silhouette of a Hamptons beach house
The soft shadow cast by linen fabric
The refined edge detail of an upholstered headboard
The simple cross-frame structure of a lantern
The broad comfortable curve of a club chair
The warm wood grain of natural oak flooring
The gentle bevel of classic interior molding
The relaxed vertical rhythm of porch columns
The understated profile of a modern American ceiling fixture
The oval silhouette of a soft fabric lampshade
The combination of wood, fabric, and warm metal in residential furniture
